creator: freebsd@ccc.de
text:
Created attachment 181751
svn diff of DE, EN, HU and NL handbook/advanced-networking/chapter.xml

In late March 2017, Pim van Pelt and Jeroen Massar announced that the SixXS IPv6 tunnel service will be shut down on 2017-06-06. Cf https://www.sixxs.net/sunset/

The attached patch reflects this within the FreeBSD Handbook Advanced Networking Chapter in DE, EN, HU and NL.
